channel.title: BUbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Late-night host Stephen Colbert isn’t backing down from public dispute with CBS bosses
WATCH: U.S.-mediated Ukraine-Russia peace talks in Geneva end after just two hours
item.description: ABC News' Patrick Reevell reports that there is still a "fundamental gap between the two sides over territory," specifically Ukraine's eastern Donbas ...

item.title: WATCH: Late Rev. Jesse Jackson's family speaks about his life and legacy
item.description: The family of the late Rev. Jesse Jackson spoke about his life and legacy during a news conference in Chicago.

item.title: 8 of 9 missing skiers found dead following California avalanche
item.description: Search crews responded to a report of an avalanche that occurred Tuesday in the Castle Peak area of California's Sierra Nevada, the Nevada County Sher...

item.title: Ilia Malinin reflects on Olympic experience: "You learn a lot more from failure"
item.description: Star figure skater Ilia Malinin stressed he was focused on moving forward and continuing to push the boundaries of the sport.

item.title: Trump administration appeals judge's order to restore slavery exhibits
item.description: The Trump administration filed an appeal after a judge ordered slavery exhibits that were removed from the President's House Site to be returned.

item.title: Jesse Jackson’s 1988 presidential run inspired generations to carry his message
The children of late civil rights leader Jesse Jackson honor his legacy a day after his death
item.description: Jesse Jackson’s children remember his civil rights legacy and describe him as a devoted father after his death at home.

item.title: Trump hosts Black History Month event at White House
item.description: President Trump held an event at the White House on Wednesday honoring Black History Month. Mr. Trump expressed his condolences to the family of the R...

item.title: Reese's family member criticizes Hershey for "quietly replacing" ingredients
item.description: Brad Reese claims Hershey is cutting costs by relying on cheaper ingredients, risking the Reese's brand.

item.title: What qualifies as a hardship with the IRS?
item.description: Struggling to pay your tax bill? The IRS has programs that may help, but you'll need to prove that you qualify.

item.title: WATCH: Eight skiers killed in deadliest ski-related avalanche in modern U.S. history
item.description: Nevada County Sheriff Shannan Moon said there were "whiteout conditions" during the rescue mission that saved six survivors.

item.title: WATCH: Unruly passenger detained after incident on Delta flight, police say
item.description: The flight was only in the air for about 15 minutes, according to KTRK.
